predictions.source_quote: Our forecast is for 2021 global GDP growth of 5.6% to be followed by 4.0% growth in 2022
We see global inflation at 3.4% for 2021 and rising to 3.8% in 2022

predictions.variable: Bank of England rate hike timing
predictions.source_quote: We expect the BoE to raise rates in December 2021 and February 2022
a patient Fed is expected to raise rates in December 2022 after fully tapering asset purchases in June
